objections.reframe: What does NOT solving this cost you per month? Most companies lose 10-20x our cost in inefficiency.
objections.follow_up: Can I show you one metric specific to {company}?

objections.reframe: What specifically changes in {timeframe}? In my experience, companies that waited always wish they hadn't — their competitors didn't.
objections.follow_up: Is there something I'm missing about why now isn't the right time?

objections.reframe: Makes sense. If this is a fit, who else needs to be in the room? Could the three of us talk this week?
objections.follow_up: What would {decision_maker} need to see to say yes?

objections.reframe: I hear that. The last {similar_company} said the same — until we ran the numbers. Can I show you one metric?
objections.follow_up: What's the one thing about your current solution that frustrates your team?

objections.reframe: We work alongside {competitor} for a lot of clients. We handle what they don't. What's the one thing about them that frustrates your team?
objections.follow_up: Most of our best clients were using {competitor} when we first spoke.

objections.reframe: I did — check your inbox. I'm calling because what I sent is time-sensitive. Quick 2-minute question: [pivot to pain point]
objections.follow_up: What specific information would help you decide? I'll send exactly that.

objections.reframe: Respect that. Out of curiosity — what would have to be true for this to be worth 10 minutes of your time?
objections.follow_up: If your situation changes, what would be the trigger to revisit?

objections.reframe: I get it — this will take 90 seconds. I called because [specific trigger]. Is [pain point] still a problem?
objections.follow_up: What time tomorrow works for a 2-minute call? Morning or afternoon?

objections.reframe: I understand why you'd ask — I'll take that as a compliment. I've been told I sound too good to be human. But let's focus on {pain_point}.
objections.follow_up: Can you tell me more about how that's impacting your {metric}?

objections.reframe: No catch. We built this because we solved our own problem. Now other companies pay us to solve theirs. Simple as that.
objections.follow_up: The only 'catch' is we're selective about who we work with. Based on what you've shared, you'd qualify.
